response:
To compute the **sample variance** of the data set:

$$
\{-22, 22, 11, -19, 8, 7\}
$$

---

### Step 1: Find the **mean** of the data set

$$
\text{Mean} = \frac{-22 + 22 + 11 - 19 + 8 + 7}{6}
$$

$$
= \frac{(-22 + 22) + (11 - 19) + (8 + 7)}{6}
$$

$$
= \frac{0 - 8 + 15}{6} = \frac{7}{6}
$$

---

### Step 2: Compute the **deviations from the mean**

$$
\begin{align*}
-22 - \frac{7}{6} &= -\frac{151}{6} \\
22 - \frac{7}{6} &= \frac{127}{6} \\
11 - \frac{7}{6} &= \frac{61}{6} \\
-19 - \frac{7}{6} &= -\frac{121}{6} \\
8 - \frac{7}{6} &= \frac{41}{6} \\
7 - \frac{7}{6} &= \frac{35}{6}
\end{align*}
$$

---

### Step 3: Square each deviation

$$
\begin{align*}
\left(-\frac{151}{6}\right)^2 &= \frac{22801}{36} \\
\left(\frac{127}{6}\right)^2 &= \frac{16129}{36} \\
\left(\frac{61}{6}\right)^2 &= \frac{3721}{36} \\
\left(-\frac{121}{6}\right)^2 &= \frac{14641}{36} \\
\left(\frac{41}{6}\right)^2 &= \frac{1681}{36} \\
\left(\frac{35}{6}\right)^2 &= \frac{1225}{36}
\end{align*}
$$
